columns.name: dem_sap
columns.label: SAP/NHC
columns.description: SAP code associated with the patient.

columns.name: committee
columns.label: Presented in committee
columns.description: Indicates whether the case or treatment plan has been presented in a multidisciplinary or review committee.

columns.name: committee_type
columns.label: Committee type
columns.description: Selects if the case was mentioned or discussed.

columns.name: committee_date
columns.label: Date of presentation in committee
columns.description: Date on which the case was presented in the committee.

columns.name: committee_decision
columns.label: Committee decision
columns.description: Indicates the decision or recommendation made by the committee regarding the case.
